name: detector contract: $CLAUDE_TDD_PRO_WORKDIR overrides $PWD as the root for relative --paths globs
command: mkdir -p elsewhere && echo 'const x: any = 1;' > elsewhere/a.ts && CLAUDE_TDD_PRO_WORKDIR="$PWD/elsewhere" bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --json --paths "*.ts" 2>out.json && grep -E '"filename":"a\.ts"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
